overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, industrial urban district with wet reflective streets and massive overhead metal structures. The player character moves from a sidewalk onto the street and proceeds under heavy industrial overpasses with red warning lights, encountering sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles in a neon-lit cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath overhead transit structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk next to industrial buildings, passing scattered trash and debris

entered.detail: industrial building with red, white, and blue horizontal stripes on the facade
tall industrial structure with illuminated '03' signage near the top
massive yellow steel truss structure spanning across the street overhead
tall black street lamp casting bright white light onto the wet pavement
large illuminated billboard with colorful advertisements on the right building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night in an industrial district, with the camera walking along a wet concrete sidewalk. A distinctive red, white, and blue striped building occupies the left side while an industrial structure with a glowing '03' sign stands on the right. Massive steel trusses loom overhead, and street lamps cast harsh white light through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane industrial street with overhead transit structures

events.description: ego steps off the sidewalk curb and moves onto the asphalt street surface

agents.ego_description: transitioning from the sidewalk onto the wet asphalt street, moving toward the center of the road

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving down the street in the opposite direction with headlights on

entered.detail: wet black asphalt road surface with yellow double lines and reflective puddles
circular metal manhole cover surrounded by wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the sidewalk onto the wet asphalt street, revealing the full width of the industrial road. The massive overhead truss structure draws closer, dominating the sky view. A vehicle passes in the distance on the left as the camera continues forward over manhole covers and yellow road markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street passing under heavy industrial overpass with red warning lights

events.description: white SUV drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of the street approaching a pedestrian on the sidewalk ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a purple jacket walking ahead on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the right edge of the street
low concrete wall separating the street from the building on the left

changed.to: structure with illuminated red warning lights

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the industrial overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed as red warning lights illuminate the overhead truss structure. A white SUV passes by on the left while the camera approaches a pedestrian in a purple jacket walking on the right sidewalk. Metal guardrails and concrete barriers line the street edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under deep industrial overpass with neon signage ahead

events.description: passing under the deepest section of overpass where red lights illuminate the structural beams above

agents.ego_description: following pedestrians through the covered sidewalk section beneath the massive overpass structure

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: pink and red illuminated neon signs visible in the distance at the end of the overpass
massive concrete and steel pillars supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deep under the overpass onto a covered concrete walkway, completely sheltered from the sky. Red lights illuminate the massive steel beams overhead while neon signs glow in the distance ahead. The camera follows pedestrians walking through this enclosed industrial corridor, with large support pillars lining the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a foggy industrial district that transitions from an open street into a sheltered, neon-lit concrete corridor. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk flanked by a striped building and a glowing sign, with massive steel trusses looming overhead through a harsh white haze. As the camera moves onto the asphalt road, the perspective expands to reveal yellow road markings and distant vehicles before the overhead structure begins to dominate the sky. The scene then becomes more enclosed as the camera passes a white SUV and a pedestrian in a purple jacket, with the lighting shifting to red warning glows beneath the heavy industrial overpass. Finally, the movement leads deep under the structure onto a covered walkway, where the open sky is replaced by massive steel beams and support pillars leading toward distant neon signs.
